biological_replicate: we transduced mice with adeno-associated virus (AAV) expressing HBV
technical_replicate: we performed RNA pulldown coupled with quantitative proteomics
experimental_design: To investigate the role of ELAVL1 in HBV replication, we knocked down ELAVL1 in HBV-infected HepG2-NTCP cells
factor_value: we identify a key host factor embryonic lethal, abnormal vision, Drosophila-like 1 (ELAVL1)
